name: Water Bottle (Classic)
flavor: Warm. Slightly dented. Perfect.

name: Water Bottle (Fancy Label)
flavor: Has a logo for a company that no longer exists. Collectible.

name: Water Bottle (Half-Empty)
flavor: Someone left this. It's not your fault they're gone.

name: Tactical Water Bottle
flavor: Has MOLLE attachments. Holds water AND attitude.

name: Water Bottle (Mystery Fluid)
flavor: Moon water. Made with real cranks.

name: Expired MRE
flavor: Best before: a date that feels personal.

name: Left Boot
flavor: Someone out there has the right one. The pair would be worth something.

name: Crumpled Memo
flavor: Subject: MANDATORY FUN. The irony is not lost on you.

name: Decorative Spoon
flavor: Commemorating a place that is definitely also abandoned now.

name: Loose Battery (Maybe Charged)
flavor: Rattles hopefully. Approximately 40% of batteries are fine.

name: Broken Umbrella
flavor: Two spokes missing. Still projects the right energy.

name: Novelty Mug (World's Okayest Survivor)
flavor: Technically accurate.

name: Golden Water Bottle
flavor: Solid gold. Terrible insulator. Priceless flex.

name: Cursed Music Box
flavor: Plays a haunting melody that reminds you of something you can't quite place.

name: Vintage Comic Book
flavor: Features a hero who fights robots. The cover is torn but the nostalgia is intact.

name: Half-Empty Bag of Chips
flavor: The chips are stale but the emotional value is high.

name: Mysterious Key
flavor: It's heavy and cold. It doesn't fit any locks you can find. What could it open?

name: Pair of Fuzzy Dice
flavor: Once hung in a car that drove past you every day. The car is gone but the vibes remain.

name: Tabitha's phone
flavor: The screen is cracked and it's locked. You can see multiple notification previews: 'You're two hours late'

name: Dirty Stripper Panties
flavor: Damp and stained. From both holes. The ultimate loot.

name: Hans Gruber (alive)
flavor: The legendary Hans Gruber. Tabitha lost him again...
